case.title: HOUSEHOLD GOODS CARRIERS' BUREAU v. UNITED STATES

opinion.h1: HOUSEHOLD GOODS CARRIERS' BUREAU v. UNITED STATES, 393 U.S. 265 (1968)
opinion.h4: HOUSEHOLD GOODS CARRIERS' BUREAU ET AL. v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE NORTHERN DISTRICT OF CALIFORNIA. No. 615. Decided December 16, 1968.
opinion.p: Alan F. Wohlstetter for Household Goods Forwarders Association of America, Inc., et al., intervening defendants below.
Solicitor General Griswold, Assistant Attorney General Zimmerman, Robert W. Ginnane, and Betty Jo Christian for the United States et al.
The motions to affirm are granted and the judgment is affirmed.
393 U.S. 265 OGLE v. HEIM, AUDITOR-CONTROLLER OF COUNTY OF ORANGE. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF CALIFORNIA. No. 617. Decided December 16, 1968.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
